title: Green Core 1.0 — The Foundation is Set
content:
The beginning

After eighteen months of internal incubation, Green Core 1.0 is the first public release of SEB's framework-agnostic web component library. Built on Lit and the custom elements standard, it establishes the technical foundation for a design system that works across React, Angular, and vanilla HTML.

What's included

Version 1.0 ships with 24 production-ready components covering the most common UI patterns: buttons, form inputs, dropdowns, dialogs, cards, and more. Each component is fully accessible, keyboard-navigable, and designed to work inside any shadow DOM boundary.

The design token system

Alongside the components, we're releasing the first version of the Green token system — a structured set of CSS custom properties that map semantic design decisions (color, spacing, radius, typography) to concrete values. Tokens are exported as CSS, JSON, and TypeScript constants.
